html:
Exclusive to:

Cultivated Turf is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires 1 Rainforest Turf and 1 Ashes to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as fuel.

It also spawns naturally in the Cultivated Biome.

When placed on the Surface World covering a large enough area, Redbirds and Crows are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, this Turf will not spawn Puddles. Expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.

Gallery

  • Cultivated Turf texture.
  • Wilson standing on placed Cultivated Turf.
  • Cultivated Turf as seen on the Map.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Cultivated Turf is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires 1 Rainforest Turf and 1 Ashes to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as fuel.
It also spawns naturally in the Cultivated Biome.
When placed on the Surface World covering a large enough area, Redbirds and Crows are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs.
In the Shipwrecked DLC, this Turf will not spawn Puddles. Expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đất trồng trọt là một Vật phẩm Đất trồng trọt được dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó cần 1 Đất Rừng Nhiệt Đới và 1 Tro để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Giống như các loại Đất khác, nó có thể được đặt trên bất kỳ nền đất trống nào hoặc dùng làm nhiên liệu.

'''Cultivated Turf''' is a craftable [[Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It requires 1 [[Rainforest Turf]] and 1 [[Ashes]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as [[Fire#Fuel|fuel]].

It also spawns naturally in the [[Cultivated]] [[Biomes|Biome]].

When placed on the [[Surface World]] covering a large enough area, [[Redbird]]s and [[Crow]]s are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs.

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, this Turf will not spawn [[Flooding|Puddles]]. Expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.
